wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Supertubos looks like a fun-sized window for Worth checking, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 126 kJ, 12 s period, workable consistency 46/100, and wind is the main risk.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort; 10-13s at mid tide is the prime barrel / wedge setup for Supertubos / Molhe Leste; worth keeping on the radar because Surfline is showing it above Poor while most other local spots are Poor..  Watch: wind is over 30 km/h; wind fit is poor or too strong.
best.shortExplanation: Supertubos is worth a quick check for after work (17:00 start), but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide is lining up for a powerful wedge, so keep the comfort level in mind.
warnings: wind fit is poor or too strong
